interaction_phrase: jointly to Steven Chu, Claude Cohen-Tannoudji and William D. Phillips
occurrence_sentence: In 1997 the Nobel Prize in Physics was awarded jointly to Steven Chu, Claude Cohen-Tannoudji and William D. Phillips "for development of methods to cool and trap atoms with laser light."

interaction_phrase: jointly
occurrence_sentence: In 2001 it was awarded jointly to Eric A. Cornell, Wolfgang Ketterle and Carl E. Wieman "for the achievement of Bose-Einstein condensation in dilute gases of alkali atoms, and for early fundamental studies of the properties of the condensates."
